description:
Prime Base Charts – Learn the Language of Charts

In this video, we study the chart of ICICI Lombard General Insurance Co. Limited to understand price structure, key levels, and overall market behaviour using simple technical analysis concepts.

This discussion focuses on how price reacts near important zones and how structure develops over time.

I am deeply grateful to my Guru, my parents, and my well-wishers for their guidance and blessings, which allow me to learn and share this knowledge further.
This channel focuses on studying stock market indices and charts with a simple belief:👉 Charts speak for themselves.
Our mission is to help viewers learn how to read price action and market structure so they can better understand what the market is communicating. Everyone deserves the knowledge to protect their hard-earned money from unexpected market moves and emotional decisions.
At Prime Base Chart Learning, we aim to explain chart concepts in simple, practical language, making technical analysis accessible regardless of your background, age, or experience. The goal is to encourage viewers to form their own independent view by learning how prices behave, rather than following tips or news.

What You Will Learn on This Channel
This channel is created only for learning and educational purposes, where we study:
* Price Action & Market Structure
* Base Formation & Breakout Behaviour
* Support & Resistance Zones
* Trend and Continuation Concepts
* How to read charts with discipline and patience
All chart discussions are intended to improve technical understanding and chart-reading skills. No stock, index, or chart shared on this channel should be interpreted as a recommendation.

Disclaimer
This channel is strictly for educational and learning purposes only. I am not a SEBI-registered investment advisor. Any stock, index, or chart discussed is shared purely for study and learning and should not be considered as trading or investment advice. Viewers are strongly advised to do their own research or consult a SEBI-registered financial advisor before making any financial decisions.
